imageAlt: Amazon Financial API Endpoint Update roadmap item preview image
title: Amazon Financial API Endpoint Update
summaryBody: Amazon are deprecating an api endpoint that is currently used to access transaction data. If we continue to provide Amazon as an add-on, then this api will need to be updated before Aug 2026
detailBody: Amazon are deprecating an api endpoint that is currently used to access transaction data. If we continue to provide Amazon as an add-on, then this api will need to be updated before Aug 2026
